temporal_description: (00:00-00:07) A young boy with blonde hair, his face filled with anguish and tears, desperately shakes an elderly person who is lying down and unresponsive. The elderly person's hand, adorned with a gold ring, is limp and resting on their face. The boy's expression is one of profound grief and urgency as he pleads with the person to wake up. (Storyline: This opening scene establishes a tragic event: an elderly person has passed away in the night, and a young boy is in denial and grief, trying to rouse them.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Desperate, pleading, and sorrowful. 2) Background sounds or music: The boy's heavy sobbing and whimpering are the only sounds.)
